payload.title: Web UI: drag cards to reorder within a column
payload.description: Vertical drag-to-reorder of cards inside a column, distinct from the existing cross-column status drop (src/web/app.js bindCardDnD/bindColumnDnD ~2662). Show an insertion indicator, compute the fractional rank from drop position, PATCH it, optimistic reorder then refresh. Same column = reorder, different column = status change.
